'''Groex Gal''' was a religious [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ebranite]] around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. He was able to communicate in the [[Ayrou/Legends|Ayrou]] [[Language/Legends|language]].

==Biography==
Gal worked as a kind of tour guide for the people on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Qina/Legends|Qina]] helping pilgrims find their way to [[Inicus Mont]], a religious retreat. He was an explorer and [[Scout/Legends|scout]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], but [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] oppression kept him from finding steady employment. Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he traveled to Mina to try and establish a colony for his people. Unfortunately, his plan never succeed, but Gal remained on Mina because of his acceptance among the [[Vashan]]s. While he helped many pilgrims bypass the more treacherous sections of the path to Inicus Mont, he ensured that visitors were not allowed to use vehicles or [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to reach the sacred place, since the journey to Inicus Mont was as much a spiritual experience as the pillar itself. Despite this belief, Gal maintained four [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], a set of ships he had hoped to use as a defense force for his Ebranite colony.<ref name="Tessent" />
